turns.user_message: I tried to listen to my favorite music to cheer up, but it just felt flat. This just started happening last week.
I keep trying things that used to work, and nothing brings any spark. It's like a switch flipped and I can't turn it back on.
I'm completely numb to everything I once loved, and the emptiness feels permanent. I don't even know who I am without those feelings.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with a failed attempt to feel better. This just started recently.
